title: Vijay’s Tamil Nadu cabinet expansion hits stumbling block over AIADMK rebels, VCK, IUML yet to decide on joining
description: The Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam government is preparing for cabinet expansion with invitations extended to VCK and IUML. The VCK plans to consult its leadership before deciding on cabinet participation, while the CPI-M warns it may reconsider support if AIADMK joins the cabinet.
